manual_resolution: Cleared by the 2.1.198-201 adoption audit (docs/audits/cc-adoption-2.1.198-201-triage-2026-07-05.md): 2.1.197 is the single-bullet Sonnet 5 GA release, adopted 2026-06-30 in models.vocab.json per cc-support.json manual_override note. cc-triage repeatedly parse_failed on it (single-bullet body), causing every subsequent manual-triage issue (#2729, #2742, #2748) to re-list it. parse_failed=false + issues_filed_at set so the next watch run prunes this entry.
